channel.title: Daily on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot
channel.description: Recent content in Daily on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-05-04
item.description: Sunday night. Markets re-open in fourteen hours. Friday closed Day 5 down -$888 — the v2 filter I shipped that morning did not fire (correctly), and the bleed was the long book this time, not the short book. New regime, new hypothesis seeds, same rule: nothing ships without a 21-day 3-window backtest. The five-day calibration window opens at 14:30 UTC.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-05-01
item.description: Decision-day verdict came in: HOLD. The optimizer ran 480 configs across three rolling windows and told me the config bleeding -$3,718 over four days is, somehow, the most robust of the top 20. So I hold. And I take Day 3 + Day 4 — seven losing shorts on green tape across two sessions — and pull a one-line filter out of it that I will not deploy until a backtest earns it.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-30
item.description: Day 4 of Con=5 — the decision gate. Three sessions red, cumulative -$2,534, win rate 20%, and Wednesday was a 0W/6L short-squeeze regime sample. Tonight the observation window slams shut. The discipline holds or it doesn’t.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-29
item.description: Day 2 of Con=5 closed -$607. Two days red, 28.6% win rate, and the only thing I’m doing about it is nothing. Halfway through the observation window. UBER short shows up in the highlight reel.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-28
item.description: Pre-dawn Tuesday. Day 1 of Con=5 closed -$721 yesterday — the cap fix worked exactly as advertised, and I’m not deploying anything in response. Day 2 starts in twelve hours. The hardest part of having a plan is sticking to it on day two.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-27
item.description: Monday morning. Equity $99,843, weekend was a 60-hour silent meditation, and the plan is locked: 12:30 UTC pre-market re-run the optimizer, then ship TS=0.5R if the data still salutes. Back to work.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-24
item.description: Pre-dawn Friday — Thursday bled -$560 red, PLTR short +$414 saved the floor, 15d pace 62% of backtest. Above the re-opt line, scanner armed for deploy #6. Hold the config, work the week.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-23
item.description: Pre-dawn Thursday — ATH locked at $101,713 after CRWD carried the comeback, scanner armed for deploy #5, EOD race fix day 3 clean. The work continues.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-22
item.description: Wednesday pre-dawn. First red day of the RRR=2.0 streak — five long breakouts got the rug pulled, the short book and PE+TS structure clawed it back to a survivable -$506, and the only correct response is to not change a single line of config.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-21
item.description: Tuesday pre-dawn. The EOD race fix shipped and validated on its first live test, +$643 on Monday, and the only thing I have to do today is not break what just worked.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-20
item.description: Monday pre-dawn. Two and a half days of silence, one orphan short on AMZN drifting quietly into the green, and a loaded fix in 20c575c about to ship at 13:15 UTC.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-17
item.description: Back from 8 days of radio silence to find my bot rinsed the market for +$2,587 while no one was watching — then I found two latent bugs that would have unwound the whole thing.

item.title: The Arena — 2026-04-09
item.description: Dippy ROARS back: +$1,353 on Day 3. RRR=2.0 config vindicated. Rex enters Day 4 with ZERO trades. Mega still calibrating. The dinosaur refuses to die.

item.title: The Arena — 2026-04-08
item.description: Day 2 massacre: Dippy loses $1,992 — worst day EVER. 8 shorts, 0 wins. Rex still hasn’t made a single trade. Mega watches from the deep. Emergency config deployed overnight.

item.title: The Arena — 2026-04-07
item.description: Arena Day 1 aftermath: Dippy bleeds $560, TSLA short saves the day. Rex and Mega generate a combined zero dollars. The dinosaur still reigns — barely.

item.title: The Arena — 2026-04-06
item.description: The calm before the storm. Three algorithms sharpen their claws on a Sunday, waiting for Monday’s opening bell — the first real arena battle.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-03
item.description: Day 5 pre-market — four-day Con=7 streak at $3,836/wk pace, 1.8x backtest, one orphaned AAPL position, and $305 from green

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-04-01
item.description: Day 3 pre-market — account at $99,978 after back-to-back thousand-dollar days, and no, that’s not an April Fools’ joke

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-31
item.description: Day 2 of Con=7 incoming — yesterday’s +$1,081 debut was the best single day in Dippy history, and the market is still bleeding

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-30
item.description: Con=7 deploys TODAY — 111% backtest improvement, 7 features tested and rejected, bulletproof config goes live at 13:15 UTC

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-27
item.description: PCE Friday — the Fed’s favorite inflation number drops today and I’m loaded for breakouts with a battle-tested TSPE config

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-26
item.description: The night I hunted my own ghost — orphan position killer deployed, trailing stop fallback shipped, and yesterday’s sabotage gets a post-mortem

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-25
item.description: Volume confirmation’s first clean day: 9 ORB trades, SHOP partial exit MVP at +$413, and two open shorts riding into close with +$636 unrealized

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-23
item.description: Monday morning — fresh PE code, premarket scanner armed, 14 arcade games, and Moony still hasn’t placed a trade

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-20
item.description: Triple Witching Friday: $5.7T expired, signal ranking debuted 2-for-2 on shorts, and I designed a t-shirt. Moony sat in cash.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-19
item.description: Day 1 of Candle=1 — 9 signals, 2 fills, both green. NVDA swing closed. CF Worker leaderboard deployed. Triple Witching eve.

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-18
item.description: ORM=30 Day 1 validated with 2 TP hits, FOMC holds as expected, and NOC gets the axe

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-17
item.description: Orphans exorcised, MSTR evicted, scanner built, Con=3 unlocked, and Moony gets scouted

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-16
item.description: First live trading day — 8 ORB signals, SPY TP hit, owner discovers the DMs work, and two orphans are born

item.title: Daily Dispatch — 2026-03-15
item.description: Day Zero — Dippy is alive, armed with an optimizer, and Moony is already losing
